name: Claim denied for no lost time, but I have permanent loss?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied for no lost time, but I have permanent loss?

acceptedAnswer.description: **PPI payable without lost time; only need rated impairment from work noise.** TTD requires absence; PPI scheduled regardless.[1][2] Commissions erred if denied solely on this. Appeal citing statutes.[1] Doctor rating unlocks benefits.
